name: spectrum-design-data
description: Adobe Spectrum design tokens, component schemas, and Spectrum 2 docs for Claude Code.

plugins.name: s2-docs
plugins.description: Spectrum 2 component documentation on-demand. Fetches S2 design guidelines, component options, and usage patterns without loading a persistent MCP server.

plugins.name: design-data
plugins.description: Spectrum design tokens, component schemas, and design-system insights via the design-data CLI. Query tokens, get component options, suggest tokens from natural language, and resolve token values.
